title: One Battle After Another - IMDB
text: One Battle After Another is a 2025 American action-comedy-thriller film written, directed, and produced by Paul Thomas Anderson. The film's ensemble cast is led by Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn, Benicio del Toro, Regina Hall, Teyana Taylor and Chase Infiniti. When their enemy resurfaces after 16 years, a group of ex-revolutionaries reunite to rescue the daughter of one of their own. More specifically, Leonardo DiCaprio plays Bob Ferguson, a counterculture radical-turned-pot-addicted recluse, whose life is upended when his daughter, Willa (Chase Infiniti), gets abducted by a revenge-bent, ultra-conservative Army colonel, Steve Lockjaw (Sean Penn). It is inspired by the 1990 novel Vineland by Thomas Pynchon. One Battle After Another ultimately emerged as a combination of two stories with some elements of Vineland, particularly the father-daughter dynamic. The film won six Oscars: Best Picture, Best Director, Best Supporting Actor (Penn), Best Adapted Screenplay, Best Film Editing, and Best Casting. Critics are nearly unanimous in their praise for PTA's 10th film, which now ranks at the top of the list of the year's best reviewed with a Rotten Tomatoes score of 98 percent and Metacritic score of 95.
